title: B69 3EL, European Metal Recycling Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/TP3938ZN/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: European Metal Recycling Limited Installation name: EMR Oldbury Permit number: EPR/TP3938ZN/V004  "
